meta.title: FreyAI Visions | AI Digitalization for Trade Businesses
meta.description: Premium digitalization for German trade businesses. Quotes, invoices, time tracking — all AI-powered in one system. Tailored for skilled trades and small businesses from 1 employee.
meta.ogTitle: FreyAI Visions — AI Digitalization for Trade Businesses
meta.ogDescription: Your digital backbone: CRM, quotes, invoices, time tracking — all AI-powered. Tailored for trade businesses.

processes.

hero.subtitle: Trained stonemason, now AI engineer — I know the daily reality of trade businesses from first-hand experience. Custom automation for skilled trades and SMEs — GDPR-compliant, efficient, affordable.
hero.portraitAlt: Jonas Glawion — Founder of FreyAI Visions

stats.timeLabel: Done for the day instead of 8 PM

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: Does this sound familiar?
problem.subtitle: Most trade businesses lose hours every week to administrative chaos.

card1.title: Paper chaos
card1.text: Orders on sticky notes, quotes in Excel, invoices in a folder. Nothing fits together.

card2.title: Office time drain
card2.text: Spending two more hours writing quotes in the evening instead of being with your family — it doesn’t have to be this way.

card3.title: Lost orders
card3.text: Inquiries get buried, quotes are forgotten, customers move on.

card4.title: Software jungle
card4.text: Five different tools, none of them talk to each other. Duplicate data entry everywhere.

solution.label: The Solution
solution.title: One system. Everything included.
solution.subtitle: FreyAI Visions builds you a digital backbone — tailored to your business.

card1.title: Everything in one place
card1.text: Customers, quotes, invoices, time tracking — one system instead of five.

card2.title: AI works for you
card2.text: Quotes are generated automatically, follow-ups run on their own.

card3.title: Mobile on the job site
card3.text: Track hours, upload photos, update status — right from your phone.

card4.title: Custom-built
card4.text: No cookie-cutter solution. Your system is tailored exactly to your workflows.

card1.title: By a tradesman, for tradespeople
card1.text: As a trained stonemason, I know daily life on the job site — and what actually helps.

card2.title: 100% GDPR-compliant
card2.text: All data on EU servers. No US cloud, no tracking, no fine print.

card3.title: Honest pricing
card3.text: Starters pay once. Larger businesses get a service contract — cancel monthly, no lock-in period.

card4.title: Personal point of contact
card4.text: No call center, no ticket system. You call me directly — I take care of it.

without.title: Without FreyAI
without.text: 5 PM, end of the workday. But first: type up 3 quotes, track down invoices, call customers back. Finally done at 8 PM.

with.title: With FreyAI
with.text: 5 PM, quick check on your phone: quotes are prepared, invoices automatically captured, customers already received a response. By 5:15 PM, you’re truly done for the day.

features.label: Modules
features.title: Everything your business needs
features.subtitle: Every module is perfectly integrated — not a patchwork, but a complete system.

card1.title: Never forget a customer again
card1.text: All customer data in one place. Who called when? When do I need to follow up? The system reminds you automatically.

card2.title: Quotes in minutes, not hours
card2.text: Select items, adjust prices, send. Starting with the Business plan, AI even drafts the text for you.

card3.title: AI that thinks ahead
card3.text: Your digital assistant analyzes inquiries, suggests prices, and reminds you of open quotes. You stay in control — the AI makes suggestions.

card4.title: Time tracking — right on the job site
card4.text: Your employees tap their phone in the morning and they’re done. No collecting paper timesheets at the end of the month. Payroll export with one click.

card5.title: Works on any phone
card5.text: No app store, no installation. Simply open in your browser — on your phone, tablet, or PC. Works offline too.

card6.title: Your accountant will love it
card6.text: DATEV-compatible export for your accountant. Revenue, expenses, receipts — all neatly prepared. Supports GoBD-compliant bookkeeping.

betweenCta.text: Sounds good? Book your free consultation now

steps.label: How it works
steps.title: 3 steps to a digital business
steps.subtitle: No months-long project. I’ll get you on track in just a few weeks.

step1.title: Analysis & Setup
step1.text: I analyze your current workflows and set up the system precisely for your business.

step2.title: Customization & Training
step2.text: Your templates, your prices, your workflows. I personally train you and your team.

step3.title: Automate & Grow
step3.text: AI automations run in the background. You focus on your craft — I handle the technology.

pricing.label: Investment
pricing.title: Transparent pricing. No fine print.
pricing.subtitle: Get started risk-free — grow with a service contract.
pricing.note: All prices are final. VAT exempt under §19 UStG (German tax law). Pilot Project & Starter have no recurring costs. Business & Enterprise include a service contract (cancel monthly).

pilot.name: Pilot Project
pilot.desc: Ideal for sole proprietors who want to try it out.

q1.question: Do I need technical knowledge?
q1.answer: No, absolutely not. The system is as easy to use as WhatsApp. I personally train you and your team and am always available for questions.

q2.question: How long does the setup take?
q2.answer: Typically 2–4 weeks. In the first week I analyze your workflows, in weeks 2–3 I set everything up, and in week 4 I train your team.

q3.question: Where is my data stored?
q3.answer: Your data is stored exclusively in EU data centers and is GDPR-compliant. You retain full control over your data at all times and can export everything.

q4.question: What happens if I want to cancel?
q4.answer: The monthly service can be cancelled at any time at the end of the month. Your data belongs to you — I export everything cleanly for you.

q5.question: Which trades is the system suitable for?
q5.answer: The system is ideal for trade businesses from 1 employee — from sole proprietors to companies with 30+ people. Whether metalwork, plumbing, electrical, carpentry, or painting — I tailor it precisely to your industry.

q6.question: What does “AI-powered” mean?
q6.answer: Artificial intelligence helps you, for example, by drafting quotes, recognizing patterns in customer inquiries, and automating follow-ups. You always retain full control — the AI makes suggestions, you decide.

q7.question: Is the initial consultation really free?
q7.answer: Yes, 100%. I look at your business together with you and show you where digitalization brings the most value. No obligations.

cta.title: Ready for the next step?
cta.text: In 15 minutes, I’ll show you what your business could look like digitally. Free and no obligation.
cta.hint: Available: Mon–Fri 4–8 PM, Sat 10 AM–4 PM
cta.legal: By booking, you agree to the processing of your data according to our Privacy Policy.
